description_long: This is a modern blue Peugeot hatchback car with a compact, aerodynamic body and a distinctive front grille featuring the Peugeot lion emblem. The car has a black roof, black side mirrors, and black wheel arches, giving it a sporty two-tone appearance. The headlights are sharply angled and integrated into the front fascia, while the taillights have a vertical, claw-like design. The side profile reveals four passenger doors and a rear hatch door, with subtle character lines running along the body. The windows are tinted, and the car sits on dark, solid wheels. The overall design is sleek and urban, suitable for city driving and parking in tight spaces.
description: A blue Peugeot hatchback car with a black roof, sporty styling, and distinctive front and rear lights. It features four passenger doors and a rear hatch, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Peugeot grille, lion emblem, sharp headlights, and black side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-tone blue and black color scheme, four doors, and compact profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Peugeot badge, vertical taillights, and rear hatch door.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the black roof, four doors, and aerodynamic lines.
